paper.title: Signals: Trajectory Sampling and Triage for Agentic Interactions

checks: The downloaded object is a readable PDF 1.7 document; pdfinfo reports the title, complete three-author byline, and 10 pages.
The layout-preserving extraction is non-empty and readable from the title and abstract through the complete signal taxonomy, experiment, limitations, conclusion, and references on manuscript page 10.
The immutable arXiv source archive passed gzip/tar inventory checks. Its six regular files contain the complete TeX manuscript, bibliography, style file, metadata, and both result-table fragments.
The arXiv API record resolves to immutable v1 metadata and its summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
warnings: The file utility reports a 6-page PDF document while pdfinfo and the extracted manuscript page boundaries report 10 pages; the manifest and index use pdfinfo and verified manuscript boundaries.

official_release_search.paper_link_evidence: The immutable v1 manuscript and complete six-file arXiv source contain no project, code, data, annotation, results, repository, or supplemental-release URL. URLs in the source occur only in bibliography records for cited work.
searches: Exact paper title plus code web search
Exact arXiv ID plus GitHub web search
Hugging Face-focused exact-title and author search
GitHub repository API searches and inspection of the later katanemo/plano Signals epic, PR, files, and merge commit

follow_on_implementation.timing_boundary: The merge is 22 days after immutable arXiv v1. Issue 908 names the paper authors as paper DRIs and says Plano is implementing the paper; PR 903 calls the code a Rust port of a Python reference at katanemo/signals. This is credible author-associated follow-on implementation evidence, not a paper-linked or paper-time release. The referenced Python repository returned 404 to an unauthenticated GitHub API request at review time.
follow_on_implementation.inspection_boundary: The snapshot exposes typed Rust detectors, thresholds, OTel emission, unit tests, and an LMSYS-chat parity harness. It contains no historical tau-bench pool, sample IDs, 900 labels, majority labels, analysis rows, or paper-result artifacts. The parity README says natural LMSYS chat covers interaction signals but not execution or environment signals.
follow_on_implementation.paper_operation_discrepancy: The paper says signals are not quality scores and environment signals are diagnosis-only. The later analyzer computes and emits overall_quality and quality_score, subtracting execution and environment exhaustion signals; this post-v1 behavior cannot be imputed to the reported experiment but is material lifecycle evidence.

official_release_search.search_result_boundary: The renewed search found a later implementation release but still no author-owned empirical artifact release. The implementation appeared after v1 and cannot reconstruct the paper experiment. This records availability at review time, not proof that no empirical release exists or will later appear.
missing_for_reproduction: the full historical tau-bench trajectory pool and exact eligible-population size N
trajectory identifiers, generating agent configurations, task/domain composition, and overlap or duplicate ledger for the three 100-item samples
the exact paper-time detector version and composite triage-score formula, weights, tie-breaking, and threshold or quota policy
sampling seeds, inclusion probabilities, overlap handling, and sampled trajectory records
the exact annotation instrument, annotator recruitment or qualification records, 900 individual labels, notes, majority labels, and adjudication lineage
run-level analysis tables and code for intervals, tests, standardization, efficiency, category, reward-stratum, and domain results

acquisition_scope: Downloaded the real immutable arXiv v1 PDF and source archive, extracted layout-preserving full text, verified readable coverage through the complete paper, and searched for an author-owned empirical release. This is source acquisition and extraction verification, not a deep review, detector audit, statistical reproduction, endorsement of the paper's interpretations, or evidence of representative failure prevalence, general sampling validity, preference-learning validity, professional validity, capability, safety, production fitness, or readiness.
review_handoff: Deep review completed at papers/agent-benchmarks/2026-07-14-signals-trajectory-triage-sampling-validity.md. It preserves the distinction between enriched review yield and prevalence/generalization, audits the later Plano implementation with a post-v1 timing boundary, and documents the quality-score divergence and still-missing empirical records.
local_storage_note: The PDF and arXiv source archive are ignored local evidence; the extracted full text, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable URLs and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
